posts: 💎 T he best way to swap on TON Tonkeeper gives access to the best swap rates on TON through integrations with trusted partners like Changelly and LetsExchange. All exchanges are carried out within partner services, with rates and fees shown clearly before you confirm. Once confirmed, the swapped tokens are delivered straight to your balance. Swap in Tonkeeper Download Tonkeeper tonkeeper.com Mini app | 𝕏 | ru | فارسی | 中文 | uz

🔐 Multisig in Tonkeeper Pro Shared wallets can turn fund transfers into a controlled, collaborative process. When Multisig is enabled in Tonkeeper Pro, each transaction must be approved by a selected group of participants before it’s sent. You can configure signing parameters, from requiring approval by all participants to a smaller number of approvals to confirm a transaction. This setup works well when: • transfers are frequent • responsibility is shared • transactions need to be reviewed before sending Used by teams, DAOs, and operators managing shared or high-responsibility wallets. Get started with Tonkeeper Pro Download Tonkeeper Pro for iPhone. Mini app | 𝕏 | ru | فارسی | 中文 | uz

💳 How to top up USDT TRC20 in Tonkeeper USDT on TRON is supported in Tonkeeper and can be purchased directly in the app. The flow is fast and integrated with Mercuryo. How do you purchase USDT on TRC20? 1. Open Tonkeeper and make sure USDT TRC20 is enabled in your wallet. 2. Go to Buy or Sell and find Buy USDT TRC20 3. The USDT TRC20 wallet opens with a Buy USDT button. What appears in checkout: - Provide your TRON address - Mercuryo shown as the provider - Card payment to confirm After processing, USDT TRC20 appears in your wallet. Note: On iOS, USDT TRC20 needs to be enabled in Settings. On Android, it’s available from the main page. 📲 Buy USDT TRC20 Download Tonkeeper tonkeeper.com Mini app | 𝕏 | ru | فارسی | 中文 | uz

💎 Tonkeeper for iOS: update available The new version brings a cleaner interface and a smoother experience across the app. What you will notice - A refreshed promo area on the main screen. - A built in Swap flow with a more direct, simplified layout. - Fees shown in fiat now update more consistently and reflect the actual cost. Under the hood - Number formatting is now improved for a more precise experience throughout the app - Extra protection prevents transfers to addresses already identified as unsafe. The update is live in the App Store , install and enjoy. Download Tonkeeper tonkeeper.com Mini app | 𝕏 | ru | فارسی | 中文 | uz

💎 Staking TON in Tonkeeper Staking in Tonkeeper takes only a few taps. Choose the amount, confirm, and your TON starts earning rewards automatically. The interface stays clear at every step. You see your balance, projected rewards, and staking status without digging through menus. Tonstakers and ChainSIM are currently running a staking campaign . If you stake at least 10 TON in Tonkeeper from 21/11 to 28/11 at 14:00 UTC, you are automatically entered for a chance to win a prize. Start Staking Download Tonkeeper tonkeeper.com Mini app | 𝕏 | ru | فارسی | 中文 | uz

Local data with TonMobile Skip local SIM shops and airport kiosks. TonMobile lets you buy an eSIM from local providers in the Tonkeeper browser. Open Tonkeeper → Browser → TonMobile . Choose a country, pick a data pack, and pay with Tonkeeper. Once your eSIM is activated, it runs alongside your regular SIM, so you keep your number and use affordable local data wherever you need. Get your eSIM today with TonMobile . Download Tonkeeper tonkeeper.com Mini app | 𝕏 | ru | فارسی | 中文 | uz

🔀 Trade TON, USDT, and more in one tap Swapping tokens is a regular part of using TON. You might be picking up something new, rebalancing your wallet, or supporting your favorite Meme Republic contender. Either way, you can do it directly in Tonkeeper. Tap Swap on the home screen to trade through Ston.fi , with no extra apps or connections needed. Top up your Battery and swap fees will be covered automatically. You can still swap tokens using the Tonkeeper browser: 1. Open the browser tab and go to https://app.ston.fi 2. Connect your wallet 3. Choose a pair to swap 4. Сonfirm the transaction in your wallet Exchanging tokens in Tonkeeper is simple and convenient. Try it yourself: app.tonkeeper.com/swap Download Tonkeeper tonkeeper.com Mini app | 𝕏 | ru | فارسی | 中文 | uz

💎Tonkeeper Pro is now updated across all platforms. The Pro subscription now includes one free TRC20 transfer per month — covering the most common action: sending stablecoins without worrying about fees. Monthly subscription is now available on all supported platforms — iOS, desktop, and web. It can be paid with fiat (currently only in the iOS app) or crypto. We’ve also added many visual improvements in the new Tonkeeper Pro version and expanded language support to 20 languages. Release Notes Download Tonkeeper Pro for iPhone. Learn more at tonkeeper.com/pro. Mini app | 𝕏 | ru | فارسی | 中文 | uz

🚀 Pay TRC20 Fees in TON with Tonkeeper Pro Tonkeeper Pro now lets you pay fees in TON for USDT TRC20 transactions, making transfers almost 2x cheaper than paying with TRX. Choose How You Pay You can send or receive USDT TRC20 in Tonkeeper Pro and choose how to cover fees: • Battery — top up with Apple Pay, TON, or TON-based tokens and use it for any transaction. • TON balance — pay directly in TON, used for both TON and TRC20 transfers. 💎 The TON Advantage Tonkeeper Pro uses an optimized solution for TRC20 transfers. Paying fees in TON cuts costs by almost half compared to TRX. Savings may vary depending on network conditions. Download Tonkeeper Pro

💰 USDe and tsUSDe in Tonkeeper USDe and tsUSDe by Ethena are now live in Tonkeeper on iOS and Android. Balances, staking, and Ethena’s APY are tracked directly inside the wallet. When staked, USDe converts into tsUSDe, the version that earns protocol rewards. Ethena’s APY updates weekly, with the option to boost yields in TON. Tonkeeper integrates the full flow natively, so you can manage positions without leaving the app. About Ethena Ethena is a synthetic dollar protocol built on Ethereum that provides a crypto-native solution for money, USDe, alongside a globally accessible dollar savings asset, sUSDe. 👉 Please note that Tonkeeper shares the news for informational purposes only and does not provide any investment or financial advice. Do Your Own Research. Review Ethena’s terms, risks and disclosures available at https://docs.ethena.fi/ . This communication is not intended for EU, UK, or US consumers. Download Tonkeeper tonkeeper.com Mini app | 𝕏 | ru | فارسی | 中文 | uz

⚡️ XDAO in Tonkeeper: Create Your DAO Instantly! Got startup shares to split? A crypto project to manage? A community to organize? Now you can do it transparently with XDAO in Tonkeeper. With XDAO, any chat becomes a digital organization. 🎁 Exclusive for Tonkeeper users - 2% $DAO allocation for the first 25,000 DAOs. - Automatic entry into the main airdrop. 📌 How to Participate in Airdrop Create a DAO via XDAO: https://ton.xdao.app/ 💡 Main features - Smart contract automation — no paperwork. - Treasury control with multisig voting. - Launch in 2 minutes, no coding required. - 32,000+ organizations already active across 40+ chains. 💎 Perfect For Startups → fast ownership setup and team coordination. Business DAOs → pooled capital and automated returns. Communities → fair budget and role distribution. Social projects → transparent donation management. 🚀 Start building your DAO today! Download Tonkeeper tonkeeper.com Mini app | 𝕏 | ru | فارسی | 中文 | uz

We loved seeing the range of projects built with TONAPI. 🥳Congratulations to the 5 winners who will share the 5,000 USDT prize pool in the form of Bitrefill gift cards, with 1,500 USDT awarded to first place. Winning entries: 1st: link 2nd: link 3rd: link 4th: link 5th: link We appreciate the effort from every participant. The number of submissions exceeded our expectations, so we needed a bit more time to review them all. Thank you for your patience. 📨Winners will be contacted by email to arrange prize distribution. We look forward to seeing more builds with TONAPI. Download Tonkeeper tonkeeper.com Mini app | 𝕏 | ru | فارسی | 中文 | uz

🌱 Tonkeeper × Cointelegraph Accelerator We’re partnering with Cointelegraph Accelerator to support early-stage teams building on TON. The program helps Web3 startups grow through mentorship and access to experienced partners across the industry. Projects in the Accelerator program get access to Tonkeeper infrastructure. These are the same tools that power wallets, explorers, and apps across the TON network. This makes it easier to go from prototype to product without getting bogged down by setup, integrations, or on-boarding hurdles. More teams are starting to build on TON. Tonkeeper gives them a stable trusted base to build efficiently and focus on what matters. Learn more on our Blog . Download Tonkeeper tonkeeper.com Mini app | 𝕏 | ru | فارسی | 中文 | uz

🌐 Meet the new browser inside Tonkeeper Pro iOS Tonkeeper Pro iOS just got a major upgrade. You can now use dApps, explore partner offers, and on-chain tools directly inside your wallet—no need for external apps or browsers. Your dApps are now part of your wallet. The new browser is fast, easy to use, and great for multitasking: - Open multiple tabs quickly and pin your favorites. - Switch between wallets smoothly within any tab. - Jump straight into staking, trading, or exploring partner services without leaving Tonkeeper. 📱To access the Browser, update Tonkeeper Pro to the latest version on iOS. You’ll find the Browser button on the right side of the main screen. Everything you need on TON, in one place. Download Tonkeeper Pro for iPhone . Learn more at tonkeeper.com/pro .

💻 Build with TONAPI — YouTube Contest We’re inviting developers to create technical YouTube content that demonstrates how TONAPI , our powerful SaaS tools for building dApps, integrating smart contracts, and crafting custom blockchain solutions, enables real-world use cases. TONAPI service allows developers to build decentralized applications on top of the TON blockchain without having to deal with the complexity of the underlying technology. Over 80% of projects in the TON ecosystem use TONAPI. Submissions can include: - Live coding or walkthroughs - Deep-dive tutorials - Project demos - Comparisons with other tooling 🏆 Top 5 videos will be selected. Total prize pool of 5,000 USDT (Bitrefill Gift Card). Winning entries will also receive visibility on Tonkeeper social channels, TONAPI discount codes, potential dApp Browser integrations, and invitations to our exclusive mentorship program. 👉 Submit by emailing contest@tonkeeper.com with subject “TONAPI Contest” 📆 Deadline: July 18 Submission guidelines

💎 Tonkeeper forever Today we announce that TOP is acquiring 100% of Tonkeeper. See the full press release here: /channel/topco/162 Here's my message to all our users. Four years ago, TOP, Oleg Illarionov, and I took on a big mission: getting TON back on its feet by building great mass-market products. Our team delivered standout solutions that are inventive, well-engineered, and stylish across the TON tech stack. We’ve built Tonkeeper, TON API, and Tonviewer, which have become flagship products that other ecosystems can benchmark. We were first to launch gasless payments at scale and contributed to the key ecosystem technologies: TON Connect, the Tact language, the W5 account standard, and on-chain subscriptions. Together with Telegram, TOP, and the community, we rebooted TON and delivered the products and infrastructure it needed. It's been a monumental work that I'm very proud of. I am forever grateful to my cofounders, to my team, all the partners I have worked with, and of course — our users, who trusted us to make the best wallet for TON ecosystem. We’ve always worked closely with TOP teams, since the very beginning of this project. Now, in 2026, we’re taking this collaboration to the next level. I want our goals to be aligned better, our engineering teams to work closer and streamline the overall management. Tonkeeper, now even more integral part of TOP will become a more powerful app and push TON even further. I'm excited for TON's future with this updated setup! Yours truly, Oleg Andreev.

Tonkeeper for Android now supports USDT TRC20 transfers with fees covered in TON. Instead of relying on TRX, fees are handled using the available TON balance. Fees are often up to two times cheaper than paying TRC20 fees directly in TRX, depending on network conditions. Sending USDT on TRC20 with fees in TON is often cheaper and more efficient in Tonkeeper. Update Tonkeeper on Android and try it out . Download Tonkeeper tonkeeper.com Mini app | 𝕏 | ru | فارسی | 中文 | uz

🔀 Cross-chain swaps on Android Swapping TON to USDT TRC20 on Android just got much easier. Tonkeeper opens the LetsExchange swap view inside the app, giving you a direct path from TON and many other networks to TRC20 USDT. Here’s how it works in Tonkeeper: - Tap USDT TRC20 in your wallet - Select Swap and choose TON - Enter the amount and confirm The USDT TRC20 lands directly in your wallet ⬇️ With LetsExchange built in, you also get access to 5,000+ cryptocurrencies across 300+ networks, all handled directly inside Tonkeeper. Download Tonkeeper tonkeeper.com Mini app | 𝕏 | ru | فارسی | 中文 | uz

Tonkeeper Pro is where we ship advanced TON features first. Think of Tonkeeper Pro less as another wallet and more as a workspace for advanced TON operations. In a new interview with @ thedailyton , Tonkeeper CEO Oleg Andreev explains how Pro became the launchpad for advanced TON features, how multiwallet and multisig needs drive its design, and what it takes to keep the same mental model on both desktop and mobile. Highlights: • early access to tooling built on W5 and TRON gasless transactions • interfaces that fit treasury, payroll and team approval workflows • clear context when switching between many wallets across devices Full interview: Link Download Tonkeeper Pro for iPhone. Learn more at tonkeeper.com/pro. Mini app | 𝕏 | ru | فارسی | 中文 | uz

💸 Buy TON & USDT in Tonkeeper If you're looking to top up your wallet, Tonkeeper gives you a simple way to buy TON or USDT using your card or bank account. On iOS & Android Tap Buy or Sell on the home screen to view available providers. You’ll see options like Mercuryo, with support for cards, Apple Pay, Google Pay and SEPA. Setup takes just a few minutes. Some services may request ID or passport verification. 🌍 Regional access If you don’t see any providers in the app due to your location, you can explore other options on app's main page or in the embedded dApp browser. Tonkeeper’s trusted partners make it easy, safe, and fully legal to buy TON and USDT in most countries. Download Tonkeeper tonkeeper.com Mini app | 𝕏 | ru | فارسی | 中文 | uz

🛍 Spend TON on Bitrefill with Tonkeeper Turn the balance in your wallet into real purchases. With Bitrefill you can get eSIMs for travel, mobile top ups, gift cards for coffee, rides, shopping, and credit for streaming and gaming. How it works: hold TON or USDT on TON in Tonkeeper, pick your item on Bitrefill, pay from your wallet. 📖 Read the full guide. Try Bitrefill on Tonkeeper. 💱 Peer-to-peer trading comes to Tonkeeper Anzo brings peer-to-peer trading into Tonkeeper, making it simple to create offers, match with others, and move between cash and USDT securely through local payment methods You can: • Buy or sell USDT with local payment methods like bank transfers, e-wallets, Zelle, or PayPal • Choose fixed or market pricing • Set your own trade range and confirm every step in Tonkeeper with escrow protection ⚡️As offers grow, spreads tighten and trades clear faster, making the market more efficient for all participants. 🌍 The service is already accessible to users in 12 countries — see the full list in our blog: Learn More Buy & sell USDT directly in Tonkeeper with Anzo. Download Tonkeeper tonkeeper.com Mini app | 𝕏 | ru | فارسی | 中文 | uz
